memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_MCU_UART0_CTS
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000011 /* MCU UART0 Clear To Send Pin */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_MCU_UART0_RTS
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000012 /* MCU UART0 Request To Send Pin */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_MCU_UART1_CTS
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000015 /* MCU UART1 Clear To Send Pin */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_MCU_UART1_RTS
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000016 /* MCU UART1 Request To Send Pin */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_RFC_SMI_DL_OUT
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000035 /* RF Core SMI Data Link Out */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_RFC_SMI_DL_IN
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000036 /* RF Core SMI Data Link in */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_RFC_SMI_CL_OUT
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000037 /* RF Core SMI Command Link Out */

memberdef.name: IOC_PORT_RFC_SMI_CL_IN
memberdef.initializer: 0x00000038 /* RF Core SMI Command Link In */
